name: Soviet Deep Battle
descriptionTemplate: While commanding land units, whenever an enemy within a 3-tile radius is eliminated, your morale is boosted and you gain the “Breakthrough Cluster” status (increasing damage dealt by X% and stackable up to 42%), which lasts until the end of the stage.

progression.renderedDesc: While commanding land units, whenever an enemy within a 3-tile radius is eliminated, your morale is boosted and you gain the “Breakthrough Cluster” status (increasing damage dealt by 1% and stackable up to 42%), which lasts until the end of the stage.
progression.renderedDescFr: While commanding land unités, whenever an ennemi within a 3-tile radius is eliminated, your moral is boosted and you gagne l'état correspondant (increasing dégâts dealt de 1% and stackable up to 42%), which lasts until the end of the stage.

descriptionTemplateFr: While commanding land unités, whenever an ennemi within a 3-tile radius is eliminated, your moral is boosted and you gagne l'état correspondant (increasing dégâts dealt by X% and stackable up to 42%), which lasts until the end of the stage.
longDesc: Compétence spécifique à un général. « Soviet Deep Battle » monte jusqu'au niveau 5. Au niveau maximum (5), elle applique l'effet suivant : « While commanding land unités, whenever an ennemi within a 3-tile radius is eliminated, your moral is boosted and you gagne l'état correspondant (increasing dégâts dealt de 3% and stackable up to 42%), which lasts until the end of the stage. ». Compétence signature liée à une carte précise, à niveauer quand on investit dans ce général.
longDescEn: A general-specific skill. "Soviet Deep Battle" scales up to level 5. At max level (5), the skill applies the following effect: "While commanding land units, whenever an enemy within a 3-tile radius is eliminated, your morale is boosted and you gain the “Breakthrough Cluster” status (increasing damage dealt by 3% and stackable up to 42%), which lasts until the end of the stage.". A signature tied to a specific card, worth levelling whenever you invest in that general.
longDescDe: Eine generalspezifische Fähigkeit. „Soviet Deep Battle“ skaliert bis Stufe 5. Auf Maximalstufe (5) wirkt folgender Effekt: „While commanding land units, whenever an enemy within a 3-tile radius is eliminated, your morale is boosted and you gain the “Breakthrough Cluster” status (increasing damage dealt by 3% and stackable up to 42%), which lasts until the end of the stage.“. Eine an eine bestimmte Karte gebundene Signatur, die beim Investieren geleveled werden sollte.
